title: euphrasia stricta var. slovaca
intro: Euphrasia stricta var. slovaca, also known as Euphrasia slovaca, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Heterostachydaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye problems, such as conjunctivitis, cataracts, and glaucoma, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia slovaca include reducing eye pressure, improving vision, and alleviating symptoms of dry eyes. Euphrasia slovaca can be prepared as a herbal tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
